meaning: n.[化]乙醇胺,氨基乙醇,胆胺
examples: OBJECTIVE To study and improve the synthesis of liposome excipient phosphatidyl ethanolamine.
Ethanolamine and its derivative di-and triethanolamine result from reacting ammonia with ethylene oxide.
The effects of ethanolamine circulation on separating highly pure lignin were studied by GPC, IR spectrum and UV spectrum.
